title: Activity and history | SonarQube Cloud Documentation
content:
# Activity and history

## [Events](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/digging-deeper/activity-and-history/#events "Events")

There are four types of events:

- **Quality Gate**: the status of the [quality gate](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/standards/managing-quality-gates/introduction-to-quality-gates/ "quality gate") changed.
- **Profile**: the [quality profile](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/standards/managing-quality-profiles/understanding-quality-profiles/ "quality profile") used to analyze the project changed - either the profile was edited, or a different profile was used to analyze the project.
- **Version**: the project's version changed.
- **Other**: an event was manually created on a snapshot. See [Managing project history](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/digging-deeper/managing-project-history/ "Managing project history")

Events are shown on the [project overview](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/improving/main-branch-analysis/ "project overview") and in the project activity page.
